name: gold-vein
description: Gold Vein mobile app wrapper for the discipleship adventure prototype.

scripts.mobile:prepare: mkdir -p www && cp index.html styles.css script.js manifest.json service-worker.js www/ && mkdir -p www/assets && cp -R assets/. www/assets/
scripts.mobile:sync: npm run mobile:prepare && npx cap sync
scripts.mobile:open:ios: npm run mobile:sync && npx cap open ios
scripts.mobile:open:android: npm run mobile:sync && npx cap open android
